raw_consumer_statement:
I am disputing the charged-off account from [ XXXX XXXX ] on my credit report. The creditor failed to issue a Form 1099-C as required by IRS regulations for canceled or discharged debts over {$600.00}. This raises concerns regarding the accuracy and validity of the reported charge-off. 

Per IRS guidelines and case law XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ), failure to issue a 1099-C can indicate the debt was not legally canceled or forgiven, thus making the charge-off reporting potentially inaccurate.
